model

Class MatrixHandler

  • java.lang.Object
    • model.MatrixHandler

  • public class MatrixHandler
extends java.lang.Object
    Description: The MatrixHandler class provides utility methods to generate and manipulate matrices, as well as generate unique IDs based on rarity.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      MatrixHandler()
      Description: Default constructor for the MatrixHandler class.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      int calculateUniquePokemonRarities()
      Description: Calculates the number of unique Pokémon rarities in the Pokedex.
      int calculateUniquePokemonTypes()
      Description: Calculates the number of unique Pokémon types in the Pokedex.
      int countByTypeAndRarity(Type type, Rarity rarity, java.util.ArrayList<Card> pokedex)
      Description: Calculates the count of cards by the type and rarity given.
      int countMostFrequentType(java.util.ArrayList<Card> pokedex)
      Description: Calculates the Pokémon type with the most cards registered in the Pokedex.
      java.lang.String generateID(Rarity rarity)
      Description: Generates a unique ID based on the rarity of a Pokémon card.
      java.lang.String[][] generateMatrix()
      Description: Generates a 4x4 matrix filled with random integers (as Strings) between 0 and 9.
      java.lang.String generateMatrixByType(java.util.ArrayList<Card> pokedex)
      Description: Generates a matrix representation of the Pokedex grouped by Pokémon type.
      java.lang.String generateMatrixByTypeAndRarity(java.util.ArrayList<Card> pokedex)
      Description: Generates a matrix representation of the Pokedex grouped by Pokémon type and rarity.
      java.lang.String matrixToString(java.lang.String[][] matrix)
      Description: Converts a 2D String matrix into a formatted String ready for console printing.
      java.lang.String traverseMatrixN(java.lang.String[][] matrix)
      Description: Traverses a matrix in a "N" shape starting from the bottom-left cell.
      java.lang.String traverseMatrixO(java.lang.String[][] matrix)
      Description: Traverses a matrix in an "O" shape starting from the bottom-right cell.
      java.lang.String traverseMatrixX(java.lang.String[][] matrix)
      Description: Traverses a matrix in an "X" shape starting from the top-left cell.
      java.lang.String traverseMatrixZ(java.lang.String[][] matrix)
      Description: Traverses a matrix in a "Z" shape starting from the top-left cell.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • MatrixHandler

        public MatrixHandler()
        Description: Default constructor for the MatrixHandler class. Initializes an instance of MatrixHandler without any specific setup.

    • Method Detail

      • generateMatrix

        public java.lang.String[][] generateMatrix()
        Description: Generates a 4x4 matrix filled with random integers (as Strings) between 0 and 9.
        Returns:
        A 4x4 String matrix filled with random integers.

      • generateID

        public java.lang.String generateID(Rarity rarity)
        Description: Generates a unique ID based on the rarity of a Pokémon card. The ID generation process may involve the use of a matrix generated by the generateMatrix method. Precondition: The rarity parameter must not be null.
        Parameters:
        rarity - The rarity of the Pokémon card (e.g., COMMON, RARE, etc.).
        Returns:
        A unique ID as a String based on the rarity.

      • traverseMatrixN

        public java.lang.String traverseMatrixN(java.lang.String[][] matrix)
        Description: Traverses a matrix in a "N" shape starting from the bottom-left cell.
        Parameters:
        matrix - The 2D String matrix to traverse.
        Returns:
        A String containing the values of the matrix in "N" traversal order.

      • traverseMatrixZ

        public java.lang.String traverseMatrixZ(java.lang.String[][] matrix)
        Description: Traverses a matrix in a "Z" shape starting from the top-left cell.
        Parameters:
        matrix - The 2D String matrix to traverse.
        Returns:
        A String containing the values of the matrix in "Z" traversal order.

      • traverseMatrixX

        public java.lang.String traverseMatrixX(java.lang.String[][] matrix)
        Description: Traverses a matrix in an "X" shape starting from the top-left cell.
        Parameters:
        matrix - The 2D String matrix to traverse.
        Returns:
        A String containing the values of the matrix in "X" traversal order.

      • traverseMatrixO

        public java.lang.String traverseMatrixO(java.lang.String[][] matrix)
        Description: Traverses a matrix in an "O" shape starting from the bottom-right cell.
        Parameters:
        matrix - The 2D String matrix to traverse.
        Returns:
        A String containing the values of the matrix in "O" traversal order.

      • calculateUniquePokemonTypes

        public int calculateUniquePokemonTypes()
        Description: Calculates the number of unique Pokémon types in the Pokedex.
        Returns:
        The number of unique Pokémon types.

      • calculateUniquePokemonRarities

        public int calculateUniquePokemonRarities()
        Description: Calculates the number of unique Pokémon rarities in the Pokedex.
        Returns:
        The number of unique Pokémon types.

      • countMostFrequentType

        public int countMostFrequentType(java.util.ArrayList<Card> pokedex)
        Description: Calculates the Pokémon type with the most cards registered in the Pokedex. Precondition: The pokedex ArrayList must be initialized and may contain Card objects.
        Parameters:
        pokedex - Arraylist with Cards
        Returns:
        The type with the most cards, or 0 if the Pokedex is empty.

      • countByTypeAndRarity

        public int countByTypeAndRarity(Type type,
                                Rarity rarity,
                                java.util.ArrayList<Card> pokedex)
        Description: Calculates the count of cards by the type and rarity given. Precondition: The pokedex ArrayList must be initialized and may contain Card objects.
        Parameters:
        type - type given
        rarity - rarity given
        pokedex - Arraylist with Cards
        Returns:
        The count of cards by type and rarity, or 0 if the Pokedex is empty.

      • matrixToString

        public java.lang.String matrixToString(java.lang.String[][] matrix)
        Description: Converts a 2D String matrix into a formatted String ready for console printing.
        Parameters:
        matrix - The 2D String matrix to be converted.
        Returns:
        A formatted String representation of the matrix.

      • generateMatrixByType

        public java.lang.String generateMatrixByType(java.util.ArrayList<Card> pokedex)
        Description: Generates a matrix representation of the Pokedex grouped by Pokémon type. Each row in the matrix corresponds to a specific Pokémon type, and the columns contain the names of the cards belonging to that type. Precondition: The pokedex ArrayList must be initialized and may contain Card objects.
        Parameters:
        pokedex - The ArrayList of Card objects representing the Pokedex.
        Returns:
        A 2D String matrix where rows represent Pokémon types and columns contain card names.

      • generateMatrixByTypeAndRarity

        public java.lang.String generateMatrixByTypeAndRarity(java.util.ArrayList<Card> pokedex)
        Description: Generates a matrix representation of the Pokedex grouped by Pokémon type and rarity. Each row in the matrix corresponds to a specific Pokémon type, and the columns contain the names of the cards grouped by their rarity within that type. Precondition: The pokedex ArrayList must be initialized and may contain Card objects.
        Parameters:
        pokedex - The ArrayList of Card objects representing the Pokedex.
        Returns:
        A 2D String matrix where rows represent Pokémon types and columns are grouped by rarity.
